emails.subject: Re: Commission
emails.body: Both deals have been changed to reflect a flat $15 fee. And thanks so much for following up with the IT request for a default change in EnPower. Just let me know when you hear back. Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 04/17/2001 03:24 PM
